channel.title: UI on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in UI on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: k8s: From Kubernetes Dashboard to Headlamp: Understanding the Transition
item.description:
Kubernetes Dashboard has been archived, and this post explains how Headlamp maps to Dashboard workflows while adding multi-cluster support, application-centric views, plugins, and flexible deployment options. It also notes that a step-by-step migration guide will follow.

  • Source: Kubernetes Official Blog

item.title: github: New Sort by control added to Notifications
item.description:
GitHub Notifications now includes a new “Sort by” control with two options: “Newest to oldest” and “Oldest to newest.” The default behavior remains “Newest to oldest.”

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: Repository member role labels now in pull request list view
item.description:
GitHub now shows repository member role labels inline in the pull request list view for public repositories. Labels such as First-time contributor, Contributor, and Member appear directly in the list.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: View code and comments side-by-side in pull request Files changed page
item.description:
GitHub is rolling out docked panels on pull request “Files changed” pages so reviewers can keep pull request context open side-by-side while reviewing code. The panels include overview, comments, and merge status.

  • Source: GitHub
